name: sentinel-protocol
description: Sentinel Protocol - Security + PoR + ACE Layers

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd contracts && npm install && cd ../sentinel-node && npm install && cd ../api-server && npm install
scripts.deploy:registry: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-registry.ts --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:bank: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-sentinel-bank.ts --network sepolia
scripts.blacklist:sync: cd workflows/blacklist-manager && cre workflow simulate . --target local-simulation --trigger-index 1 --non-interactive --http-payload '{"action":"full-sync"}'

author: Sentinel Team
